# QuickSwap

> QuickSwap is a non-custodial DEX on Polygon and other EVM chains where you swap ERC-20 tokens straight from your own wallet.

## Key facts
- Type: AMM / DEX
- Networks: Polygon PoS, Base, Ethereum, Immutable zkEVM, Manta Pacific, Soneium, MANTRA, Somnia, X Layer, Dogechain
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Costs: Pool fee + network gas + price impact
- Token in/out: the pair you choose
- Verify: Check the pool and contract in the live app
